title: Black Velvet Moon Tour
description: Black Velvet Moon rising for one night only into the Brighton Fringe sky. Launching new songs: alt-rock with soul, folk with an Irish heart, girl meets boy with a double punch of blues and pop. A sonic journey of memory; one woman's travels in the heart and on the road sound tracked by crunchy guitars, mandolins, earthy surdos and vibrant percussion.

venue.name: St Augustine's Arts & Events Centre - Alter Room
venue.address: St. Augustine's Arts & Events Centre, Stanford Ave, Brighton
